nasb.text: They have acted corruptly toward Him, They are not His children, because of their defect; But are a perverse and crooked generation.

esv.text: They have dealt corruptly with him; they are no longer his children because they are blemished; they are a crooked and twisted generation.

cnv.text: 這世代向他行事敗壞，就不是他的兒女，滿有弊病， 這實在是個乖僻彎曲的世代。

ccb.text: 狡诈、堕落的一代啊， 你们却对祂不忠，行事败坏， 不配做祂的儿女。
